TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Albert II ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 3, Albert II, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1958) mrhuw Monaco ta' misuw hya' ga Albert II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2005 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Albert II mqwas biru sa Albert pqwsan biru seneng (Lycée Albert Premier). Albert II, t'aring kawas tay 1979 tehuk kawas tay 1981, mqwas biru sa Bristol pqwsan biru krahu, England. qnxan nya Albert II maki tay kawas 2011 msqun ki Charlene Wittstock, tehuk misuw qani. Jacques, Hereditary Prince of Monaco ga, la'iy ni Albert II. Princess Gabriella, Countess of Carladès ga, la'iy ni Albert II. Qutux Kevin I cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: alβert ii rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, alβert ii, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw monaʦ~ʨo taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa alβert ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja alβert ii mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa alβert pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ (ljʦ~ʨ*e alβert premier). alβert ii, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa βris~ɕtol pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu, eŋlan*. qnxan nja alβert ii maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki ʦ~ʨħarlene witts~ɕtoʦ~ʨk, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. *aʦ~ʨques~ɕ, ħere*itarj prinʦ~ʨe o* monaʦ~ʨo ɣa, laʔij ni alβert ii. prinʦ~ʨes~ɕs~ɕ ɣaβriella, ʦ~ʨountes~ɕs~ɕ o* ʦ~ʨarla**s~ɕ ɣa, laʔij ni alβert ii. qutux ke*in i ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: Albert II ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 3, Albert II, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1958) mrhuw Monaco ta' misuw hya' ga Albert II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2005 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Albert II mqwas biru sa Albert pqwsan biru seneng (Lycée Albert Premier). Albert II, t'aring kawas tay 1979 tehuk kawas tay 1981, mqwas biru sa Bristol pqwsan biru krahu, England. qnxan nya Albert II maki tay kawas 2011 msqun ki Charlene Wittstock, tehuk misuw qani. Jacques, Hereditary Prince of Monaco ga, la'iy ni Albert II. Princess Gabriella, Countess of Carladès ga, la'iy ni Albert II. Qutux Kevin I cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: alβert ii rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, alβert ii, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw monaʦ~ʨo taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa alβert ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja alβert ii mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa alβert pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ (ljʦ~ʨ*e alβert premier). alβert ii, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa βris~ɕtol pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu, eŋlan*. qnxan nja alβert ii maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki ʦ~ʨħarlene witts~ɕtoʦ~ʨk, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. *aʦ~ʨques~ɕ, ħere*itarj prinʦ~ʨe o* monaʦ~ʨo ɣa, laʔij ni alβert ii. prinʦ~ʨes~ɕs~ɕ ɣaβriella, ʦ~ʨountes~ɕs~ɕ o* ʦ~ʨarla**s~ɕ ɣa, laʔij ni alβert ii. qutux ke*in i ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
